data.name: FolderBrowseDlg_ExportDirectory
data.value: Select a folder to save the exported document to:

data.name: Msg_BigBitmapToCreate
data.value: The output file is too big. Please try to reduce the image resolution,\r\nor choose another export mode.

data.name: Msg_BigFileToCreateJPEG
data.value: The output file is too big to create a JPEG file. Please choose another image format or another export mode.

data.name: Msg_CannotAccessFile
data.value: The program cannot access the file \"{0}\" because it is being used by another process.

data.name: Msg_CantFitBarcodeToControlBounds
data.value: Control's boundaries are too small for the barcode

data.name: Msg_EmptyDocument
data.value: The document does not contain any pages.

data.name: Msg_FileDosntContainValidXml
data.value: The specified file doesn't contain valid XML data in the PRNX format. Loading is stopped.

data.name: Msg_FileDosntHavePrnxExtention
data.value: The specified file doesn't have a PRNX extension. Proceed anyway?

data.name: Msg_FileReadOnly
data.value: File \"{0}\" is set to read-only, try again with a different file name.

data.name: Msg_FontInvalidNumber
data.value: The font size cannot be set to zero or a negative number

data.name: Msg_IncorrectPageRange
data.value: This is not a valid page range

data.name: Msg_IncorrectZoomFactor
data.value: The number must be beetween {0} and {1}.

data.name: Msg_InvalidBarcodeText
data.value: There are invalid characters in the text

data.name: Msg_InvalidMeasurement
data.value: This is not a valid measurement.

data.name: Msg_NoDifferentFilesInStream
data.value: A document can't be exported to a stream in the DifferentFiles mode. Use the SingleFile or SingleFilePageByPage mode instead.

data.name: Msg_NotSupportedFont
data.value: This font is not yet supported

data.name: Msg_OpenFileQuestion
data.value: Do you want to open this file?

data.name: Msg_PageMarginsWarning
data.value: One or more margins are set outside the printable area of the page. Continue?

data.name: Msg_WrongPageSettings
data.value: The current printer doesn't support the selected paper size.\r\nProceed with printing anyway?

data.name: Msg_WrongPrinter
data.value: The printer name is invalid. Please check the printer settings.

data.name: Msg_WrongPrinting
data.value: An error occurred during printing a document.

data.name: Msg_XlsMoreThanMaxColumns
data.value: The created XLS file is too big for the XLS format, because it contains more than 256 columns.\r\nPlease try to reduce the amount of columns in your report and export the report to XLS again.

data.name: Msg_XlsMoreThanMaxRows
data.value: The created XLS file is too big for the XLS format, because it contains more than 65536 rows.\r\nPlease try to reduce the amount of rows in your report and export the report to XLS again.

data.name: RibbonPreview_ClosePreview_STipContent
data.value: Close Print Preview of the document.

data.name: RibbonPreview_Customize_STipContent
data.value: Open the Print Options dialog, in which you can change printing options.

data.name: RibbonPreview_DocumentMap_STipContent
data.value: Open the Document Map, which allows you to navigate through a structural view of the document.

data.name: RibbonPreview_EditPageHF_STipContent
data.value: Edit the header and footer of the document.

data.name: RibbonPreview_ExportCsv_STipContent
data.value: Export the document to CSV and save it to the file on a disk.

data.name: RibbonPreview_ExportFile_STipContent
data.value: Export the current document in one of the available formats, and save it to the file on a disk.

data.name: RibbonPreview_ExportGraphic_Description
data.value: BMP, GIF, JPEG, PNG, TIFF, EMF, WMF

data.name: RibbonPreview_ExportGraphic_STipContent
data.value: Export the document to Image and save it to the file on a disk.

data.name: RibbonPreview_ExportHtm_STipContent
data.value: Export the document to HTML and save it to the file on a disk.

data.name: RibbonPreview_ExportMht_STipContent
data.value: Export the document to MHT and save it to the file on a disk.

data.name: RibbonPreview_ExportPdf_STipContent
data.value: Export the document to PDF and save it to the file on a disk.

data.name: RibbonPreview_ExportRtf_STipContent
data.value: Export the document to RTF and save it to the file on a disk.

data.name: RibbonPreview_ExportTxt_STipContent
data.value: Export the document to Text and save it to the file on a disk.

data.name: RibbonPreview_ExportXls_STipContent
data.value: Export the document to XLS and save it to the file on a disk.

data.name: RibbonPreview_FillBackground_STipContent
data.value: Choose a color for the background of the document pages.

data.name: RibbonPreview_Find_STipContent
data.value: Show the Find dialog to find text in the document.

data.name: RibbonPreview_HandTool_STipContent
data.value: Invoke the Hand tool to manually scroll through pages.

data.name: RibbonPreview_Magnifier_STipContent
data.value: Invoke the Magnifier tool.\r\n\r\nClicking once on a document zooms it so that a single page becomes entirely visible, while clicking another time zooms it to 100% of the normal size.

data.name: RibbonPreview_MultiplePages_STipContent
data.value: Choose the page layout to arrange the document pages in preview.

data.name: RibbonPreview_PageMargins_STipContent
data.value: Select the margin sizes for the entire document.\r\n\r\nTo apply specific margin sizes to the document, click Custom Margins.

data.name: RibbonPreview_PageOrientation_STipContent
data.value: Switch the pages between portrait and landscape layouts.

data.name: RibbonPreview_PaperSize_STipContent
data.value: Choose the paper size of the document.

data.name: RibbonPreview_Parameters_STipContent
data.value: Open the Parameters pane, which allows you to enter values for report parameters.

data.name: RibbonPreview_Print_STipContent
data.value: Select a printer, number of copies and other printing options before printing.

data.name: RibbonPreview_PrintDirect_STipContent
data.value: Send the document directly to the default printer without making changes.

data.name: RibbonPreview_Scale_STipContent
data.value: Stretch or shrink the printed output to a percentage of its actual size.

data.name: RibbonPreview_SendCsv_STipContent
data.value: Export the document to CSV and attach it to the e-mail.

data.name: RibbonPreview_SendFile_STipContent
data.value: Export the current document in one of the available formats, and attach it to the e-mail.

data.name: RibbonPreview_SendGraphic_Description
data.value: BMP, GIF, JPEG, PNG, TIFF, EMF, WMF

data.name: RibbonPreview_SendGraphic_STipContent
data.value: Export the document to Image and attach it to the e-mail.

data.name: RibbonPreview_SendMht_STipContent
data.value: Export the document to MHT and attach it to the e-mail.

data.name: RibbonPreview_SendPdf_STipContent
data.value: Export the document to PDF and attach it to the e-mail.

data.name: RibbonPreview_SendRtf_STipContent
data.value: Export the document to RTF and attach it to the e-mail.

data.name: RibbonPreview_SendTxt_STipContent
data.value: Export the document to Text and attach it to the e-mail.

data.name: RibbonPreview_SendXls_STipContent
data.value: Export the document to XLS and attach it to the e-mail.

data.name: RibbonPreview_ShowFirstPage_STipContent
data.value: Navigate to the first page of the document.

data.name: RibbonPreview_ShowLastPage_STipContent
data.value: Navigate to the last page of the document.

data.name: RibbonPreview_ShowNextPage_STipContent
data.value: Navigate to the next page of the document.

data.name: RibbonPreview_ShowPrevPage_STipContent
data.value: Navigate to the previous page of the document.

data.name: RibbonPreview_Watermark_STipContent
data.value: Insert ghosted text or image behind the content of a page.\r\n\r\nThis is often used to indicate that a document is to be treated specially.

data.name: RibbonPreview_Zoom_STipContent
data.value: Change the zoom level of the document preview.

data.name: RibbonPreview_ZoomIn_STipContent
data.value: Zoom in to get a close-up view of the document.

data.name: RibbonPreview_ZoomOut_STipContent
data.value: Zoom out to see more of the page at a reduced size.

data.name: ExportOption_PdfChangingPermissions_CommentingFillingSigning
data.value: Commenting,filling in form fields,and signing exiting signature fields

data.name: ExportOption_PdfChangingPermissions_FillingSigning
data.value: Filling in form fields and signing existing signature fields

data.name: SB_PageOfPagesHint
data.value: Page number in document. Click to open Go To Page dialog.
